description: Virgin Atlantic is an airline. Its partner portal documents New Distribution Capability (NDC) APIs for travel sellers and service providers to integrate booking and servicing workflows.
summary: Virgin Atlantic exposes a public MCP server at `https://cx-mcp.virginatlantic.com/mcp` and a partner-facing VS NDC Connect HTTP API documented on `ndc.virginatlantic.com`, authenticated with an API client key in `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key`.
